title: Interesting Message Stored in Cowrie Logs, (Wed, Mar 18th)

scripts.content:
#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 — Block threat IPs for: Interesting Message Stored in Cowrie Logs, (Wed, Mar 18th)
iptables -A INPUT -s 188.214.30.5 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 64.89.161.198 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 188.214.30.5 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 64.89.161.198 -j DROP
echo 'Firewall rules applied'
SecRule REQUEST_HEADERS:Host "@rx isc\.sans\.edu|www\.shodan\.io" "id:370001,phase:1,deny,status:403,msg:'CDB APEX Block: thr-252118787511'"

| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((dest_ip IN ("188.214.30.5","64.89.161.198")) OR (query IN ("isc.sans.edu","www.shodan.io"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count

#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 — Emergency Hardening Script
# Threat: Interesting Message Stored in Cowrie Logs, (Wed, Mar 18th)
# Generated: 2026-03-22T09:02:09.457133+00:00

echo "[*] Updating system packages..."
apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y 2>/dev/null || yum update -y 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Enabling firewall..."
ufw enable 2>/dev/null || firewall-cmd --set-default-zone=drop 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Disabling unnecessary services..."
systemctl disable --now telnet.socket 2>/dev/null
systemctl disable --now rsh.socket 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Setting secure SSH configuration..."
sed -i 's/#PermitRootLogin yes/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication yes/PasswordAuthentication no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
systemctl restart sshd

echo "[+] Hardening complete for threat: thr-252118787511"
